name: eVitals.01
label: Date/Time Vital Signs Taken
definition: The date/time vital signs were taken on the patient.
element_comments: DateTime consists of finite-length characters of the form: yyyy '-' mm '-' dd 'T' hh ':' mm ':' ss ('.' s+)? (zzzzzz) yyyy a four-digit numeral that represents the year '-' separators between parts of the date portion mm a two-digit numeral that represents the month dd a two-digit numeral that represents the day T separator that indicates time-of-day follows hh a two-digit numeral that represents the hour ':' a separator between parts of the time-of-day portion mm a two-digit numeral that represents the minute ss a two-integer-digit numeral that represents the whole seconds '.' s+ (not required) represents the fractional seconds zzzzzz (required) represents the timezone (as described below) Timezones, required, are durations with (integer-valued) hour and minute properties in the form: ('+' | '-') hh ':' mm hh a two-digit numeral (with leading zeros as required) that represents the hours mm a two-digit numeral that represents the minutes '+' a nonnegative duration '-' a nonpositive duration

validation_rules.message: When Date/Time Vital Signs Taken is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Date/Time Vital Signs Taken has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
Date/Time Vital Signs Taken should be recorded, unless Obtained Prior to this Unit's EMS Care is "Yes".
Date/Time Vital Signs Taken should not be earlier than Unit Notified by Dispatch Date/Time, unless Obtained Prior to this Unit's EMS Care is "Yes".
Date/Time Vital Signs Taken should not be earlier than Arrived at Patient Date/Time, unless Obtained Prior to this Unit's EMS Care is "Yes".
Date/Time Vital Signs Taken should not be later than Destination Patient Transfer of Care Date/Time.
Date/Time Vital Signs Taken should not be later than Unit Back in Service Date/Time.
Date/Time Vital Signs Taken should not be later than Arrived at Patient Date/Time when Obtained Prior to this Unit's EMS Care is "Yes".

name: eVitals.02
label: Obtained Prior to this Unit's EMS Care
official_name: Obtained Prior to this Unit's EMS Care
definition: Indicates that the information which is documented was obtained prior to the documenting EMS units care.
element_comments: This is the NEMSIS Version 3 method to document prior aid.

validation_rules.message: When Obtained Prior to this Unit's EMS Care is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Obtained Prior to this Unit's EMS Care has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
Date/Time Vital Signs Taken should be recorded, unless Obtained Prior to this Unit's EMS Care is "Yes".
Date/Time Vital Signs Taken should not be earlier than Unit Notified by Dispatch Date/Time, unless Obtained Prior to this Unit's EMS Care is "Yes".
Date/Time Vital Signs Taken should not be earlier than Arrived at Patient Date/Time, unless Obtained Prior to this Unit's EMS Care is "Yes".
Date/Time Vital Signs Taken should not be later than Destination Patient Transfer of Care Date/Time.
Date/Time Vital Signs Taken should not be later than Unit Back in Service Date/Time.
Date/Time Vital Signs Taken should not be later than Arrived at Patient Date/Time when Obtained Prior to this Unit's EMS Care is "Yes".

name: eVitals.03
label: Cardiac Rhythm / Electrocardiography (ECG)
definition: The cardiac rhythm / ECG and other electrocardiography findings of the patient as interpreted by EMS personnel.

validation_rules.message: When Cardiac Rhythm / Electrocardiography (ECG) is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Cardiac Rhythm / Electrocardiography (ECG) has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
When Cardiac Rhythm / Electrocardiography (ECG) has a Pertinent Negative, it should be empty and it should not have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting).
When Cardiac Rhythm / Electrocardiography (ECG) has a Not Value, no other value should be recorded.
When Cardiac Rhythm / Electrocardiography (ECG) has a Pertinent Negative, no other value should be recorded.
Date/Time Last Known Well should be recorded when Patient Evaluation/Care is "Patient Evaluated and Care Provided" and Cardiac Rhythm / Electrocardiography (ECG) is "STEMI...".
Hospital Capability should be recorded when Type of Destination is "Hospital..." or "Freestanding Emergency Department" and Cardiac Rhythm / Electrocardiography (ECG) is "STEMI...".

name: eVitals.04
label: ECG Type
definition: The type of ECG associated with the cardiac rhythm.

validation_rules.message: When ECG Type is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When ECG Type has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.

version3_changes: Added to better document ECG results.

name: eVitals.05
label: Method of ECG Interpretation
definition: The method of ECG interpretation.
element_comments: "Transmission with no interpretation" may be used by EMS Agency Personnel that are not trained to interpret cardiac rhythms.

validation_rules.message: When Method of ECG Interpretation is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Method of ECG Interpretation has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
When Method of ECG Interpretation has a Not Value, no other value should be recorded.

version3_changes: Added to better document ECG results.

name: eVitals.06
label: SBP (Systolic Blood Pressure)
definition: The patient's systolic blood pressure.
element_comments: Required for ACS-Field Triage and other patient scoring systems.

validation_rules.message: When SBP (Systolic Blood Pressure) is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When SBP (Systolic Blood Pressure) has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
When SBP (Systolic Blood Pressure) has a Pertinent Negative, it should be empty and it should not have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting).

name: eVitals.07
label: DBP (Diastolic Blood Pressure)
definition: The patient's diastolic blood pressure.
element_comments: Diastolic blood pressure pattern allows for the following values: 1) A number 0 through 500 2) P 3) p

validation_rules.message: When DBP (Diastolic Blood Pressure) is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When DBP (Diastolic Blood Pressure) has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
When DBP (Diastolic Blood Pressure) has a Pertinent Negative, it should be empty and it should not have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting).

name: eVitals.08
label: Method of Blood Pressure Measurement
definition: Indication of method of blood pressure measurement.

validation_rules.message: When Method of Blood Pressure Measurement is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Method of Blood Pressure Measurement has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.

name: eVitals.09
label: Mean Arterial Pressure
definition: The patient's mean arterial pressure.
version3_changes: Added for additional patient monitoring capability.

name: eVitals.10
label: Heart Rate
definition: The patient's heart rate expressed as a number per minute.
element_comments: Pulse Rate and Electronic Monitor Rate have been merged with an additional data element for Method of Heart Rate Measurement.

validation_rules.message: When Heart Rate is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Heart Rate has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
When Heart Rate has a Pertinent Negative, it should be empty and it should not have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting).

name: eVitals.11
label: Method of Heart Rate Measurement
definition: The method in which the Heart Rate was measured. Values include auscultated, palpated, electronic monitor.
element_comments: This data element was added when Pulse Rate and Electronic Monitor Rate were merged as EVitals.10.
version3_changes: This data element was added when Pulse Rate and Electronic Monitor Rate were merged as EVitals.10.

name: eVitals.12
label: Pulse Oximetry
definition: The patient's oxygen saturation.

validation_rules.message: When Pulse Oximetry is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Pulse Oximetry has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
When Pulse Oximetry has a Pertinent Negative, it should be empty and it should not have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting).

name: eVitals.13
label: Pulse Rhythm
definition: The clinical rhythm of the patient's pulse.

name: eVitals.14
label: Respiratory Rate
definition: The patient's respiratory rate expressed as a number per minute.

validation_rules.message: When Respiratory Rate is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Respiratory Rate has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
When Respiratory Rate has a Pertinent Negative, it should be empty and it should not have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting).

name: eVitals.15
label: Respiratory Effort
definition: The patient's respiratory effort.

name: eVitals.16
label: End Tidal Carbon Dioxide (ETCO2)
definition: The numeric value of the patient's exhaled end tidal carbon dioxide (ETCO2) level measured as a unit of pressure in millimeters of mercury (mmHg), percentage or, kilopascal (kPa).

validation_rules.message: When End Tidal Carbon Dioxide (ETCO2) is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When End Tidal Carbon Dioxide (ETCO2) has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
When End Tidal Carbon Dioxide (ETCO2) has a Pertinent Negative, it should be empty and it should not have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting).
End Tidal Carbon Dioxide (ETCO2) should be no more than 100 when ETCO2 Type is "Percentage".
End Tidal Carbon Dioxide (ETCO2) should be no more than 100 when ETCO2 Type is "kPa".
End Tidal Carbon Dioxide (ETCO2) should be an integer when ETCO2 Type is "mmHg".
ETCO2 Type should be recorded when End Tidal Carbon Dioxide (ETCO2) is recorded.

name: eVitals.17
label: Carbon Monoxide (CO)
definition: The numeric value of the patient's carbon monoxide level measured as a percentage (%) of carboxyhemoglobin (COHb).

validation_rules.message: When Carbon Monoxide (CO) is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Carbon Monoxide (CO) has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
When Carbon Monoxide (CO) has a Pertinent Negative, it should be empty and it should not have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting).

version3_changes: Added to allow use of new patient monitoring devices.

name: eVitals.18
label: Blood Glucose Level
definition: The patient's blood glucose level.

validation_rules.message: When Blood Glucose Level is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Blood Glucose Level has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
When Blood Glucose Level has a Pertinent Negative, it should be empty and it should not have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting).

name: eVitals.19
label: Glasgow Coma Score-Eye
definition: The patient's Glasgow Coma Score Eye opening response.

allowed_values.display: No eye movement when assessed (All Age Groups)
Opens Eyes to painful stimulation (All Age Groups)
Opens Eyes to verbal stimulation (All Age Groups)

element_comments: Definitions now based on the National Trauma Data Standard (NTDS).

validation_rules.message: When Glasgow Coma Score-Eye is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Glasgow Coma Score-Eye has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
When Glasgow Coma Score-Eye has a Pertinent Negative, it should be empty and it should not have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting).

name: eVitals.20
label: Glasgow Coma Score-Verbal
definition: The patient's Glasgow Coma Score Verbal response.

allowed_values.display: Inappropriate words (>2 Years); Inconsistently consolable, moaning
Confused (>2 Years); Cries but is consolable, inappropriate interactions
Oriented (>2 Years); Smiles, oriented to sounds, follows objects, interacts

element_comments: Definitions now based on the National Trauma Data Standard (NTDS).

validation_rules.message: When Glasgow Coma Score-Verbal is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Glasgow Coma Score-Verbal has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
When Glasgow Coma Score-Verbal has a Pertinent Negative, it should be empty and it should not have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting).

name: eVitals.21
label: Glasgow Coma Score-Motor
definition: The patient's Glasgow Coma Score Motor response.

allowed_values.display: Obeys commands (>2Years); Appropriate response to stimulation

element_comments: Definitions now based on the National Trauma Data Standard (NTDS).

validation_rules.message: When Glasgow Coma Score-Motor is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Glasgow Coma Score-Motor has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
When Glasgow Coma Score-Motor has a Pertinent Negative, it should be empty and it should not have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting).

name: eVitals.22
label: Glasgow Coma Score-Qualifier
definition: Documentation of factors which make the GCS score more meaningful.

allowed_values.display: Initial GCS has legitimate values without interventions such as intubation and sedation

element_comments: Definitions now based on the National Trauma Data Standard (NTDS).

validation_rules.message: When Glasgow Coma Score-Qualifier is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Glasgow Coma Score-Qualifier has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
When Glasgow Coma Score-Qualifier has a Not Value, no other value should be recorded.
When Glasgow Coma Score-Qualifier is "Initial GCS has legitimate values without interventions such as intubation and sedation", no other value should be recorded.

name: eVitals.23
label: Total Glasgow Coma Score
definition: The patient's total Glasgow Coma Score.
element_comments: Can be documented or calculated from EVitals.19 (GCS-Eye), EVitals.20 (GCS-Verbal), and EVitals.21 (GCS-Motor).

validation_rules.message: When Total Glasgow Coma Score is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Total Glasgow Coma Score has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
When Total Glasgow Coma Score has a Pertinent Negative, it should be empty and it should not have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting).

name: eVitals.24
label: Temperature
definition: The patient's body temperature in degrees Celsius/centigrade.

validation_rules.message: When Temperature is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Temperature has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
When Temperature has a Pertinent Negative, it should be empty and it should not have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting).

name: eVitals.25
label: Temperature Method
definition: The method used to obtain the patient's body temperature.

name: eVitals.26
label: Level of Responsiveness (AVPU)
definition: The patient's highest level of responsiveness.
element_comments: Definition changed to indicate highest level of responsiveness.

validation_rules.message: When Level of Responsiveness (AVPU) is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Level of Responsiveness (AVPU) has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.

name: eVitals.27
label: Pain Scale Score
definition: The patient's indication of pain from a scale of 0-10.
element_comments: The Pain Score can be obtained from several pain measurement tools or pain scale types (eVitals.28). The pain scale type used should have a numeric value associated with each diagram as appropriate. If the pain scale type utilizes multiple indicators/categories the total should be calculated and entered for the pain score associated with the patient assessment.

validation_rules.message: When Pain Scale Score is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Pain Scale Score has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
When Pain Scale Score has a Pertinent Negative, it should be empty and it should not have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting).

name: eVitals.28
label: Pain Scale Type
definition: The type of pain scale used.

validation_rules.message: When Pain Scale Type is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Pain Scale Type has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.

version3_changes: Added to better document the patient's pain level.

name: eVitals.29
label: Stroke Scale Result
definition: The findings or results of the Stroke Scale Type (eVitals.30) used to assess the patient exhibiting stroke-like symptoms.

validation_rules.message: When Stroke Scale Result is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Stroke Scale Result has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
When Stroke Scale Result has a Pertinent Negative, it should be empty and it should not have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting).
Date/Time Last Known Well should be recorded when Patient Evaluation/Care is "Patient Evaluated and Care Provided" and Stroke Scale Result is "Positive".
Hospital Capability should be recorded when Type of Destination is "Hospital..." or "Freestanding Emergency Department" and Stroke Scale Result is "Positive".

name: eVitals.30
label: Stroke Scale Type
definition: The type of stroke scale used.

validation_rules.message: When Stroke Scale Type is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Stroke Scale Type has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.

version3_changes: Added to include additional detail on the stroke scale used.

name: eVitals.31
label: Reperfusion Checklist
definition: The results of the patient's Reperfusion Checklist for potential Thrombolysis use.
element_comments: Name changed from Thrombolytic Screen

validation_rules.message: When Reperfusion Checklist is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Reperfusion Checklist has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
When Reperfusion Checklist has a Pertinent Negative, it should be empty and it should not have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting).

name: eVitals.32
label: APGAR
definition: The patient's total APGAR score (0-10).
element_comments: Recommended to be taken at 1 and 5 minutes after the infants birth

validation_rules.message: When APGAR is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When APGAR has a Pertinent Negative, it should be empty and it should not have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting).

name: eVitals.33
label: Revised Trauma Score
definition: The patient's Revised Trauma Score.
element_comments: The Unweighted Revised Trauma Score is a physiological scoring system that is based on the first set of vital signs obtained from the patient, and consists of Glasgow Coma Scale, Systolic Blood Pressure and Respiratory Rate.

validation_rules.message: When Revised Trauma Score is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).

When Revised Trauma Score has a Pertinent Negative, it should be empty and it should not have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting). eLabs OeLabs.08 - Imaging Study File or Waveform Graphic0 : 1 OeLabs.07 - Imaging Study File or Waveform Graphic Type0 : 1 CeLabs.WaveformGraphicGroup0 : M OeLabs.06 - Imaging Study Results0 : 1 OeLabs.05 - Imaging Study Type0 : 1 CeLabs.LabImageGroup0 : M OeLabs.04 - Laboratory Result0 : 1 OeLabs.03 - Laboratory Result Type0 : 1 CeLabs.LabResultGroup0 : M OeLabs.02 - Study/Result Prior to this Unit's EMS Care0 : 1 OeLabs.01 - Date/Time of Laboratory or Imaging Result0 : 1 CeLabs.LabGroup0 : M eLabs eLabs

name: eVitals.34
label: Stroke Scale Score
definition: The stroke score value associated with the stroke scale type listed in eVitals.30.
element_comments: Score associated with the stroke scale listed in eVitals.30

validation_rules.message: When Stroke Scale Score is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element) or a Pertinent Negative (if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Stroke Scale Score has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
When Stroke Scale Score has a Pertinent Negative, it should be empty and it should not have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting).

name: sAgency.01
label: EMS Agency Unique State ID
definition: The unique ID assigned to the EMS Agency which is associated with all state licensure numbers and information.
element_comments: Used to populate dAgency.01 EMS Agency Unique State ID.

validation_rules.message: When EMS Agency Unique State ID is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When EMS Agency Unique State ID has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
EMS Agency Unique State ID and EMS Agency Number should be a unique combination for each EMS agency.

name: sAgency.02
label: EMS Agency Number
definition: The state-assigned provider number of the EMS agency.
element_comments: This may be the EMS Agency Name or a unique number assigned by the state EMS office. This is required to document multiple license types and numbers associated with the same EMS agency. Used to populate the following data elements: dAgency.02 EMS Agency Number eScene.03 Other EMS or Public Safety Agency ID Number eDisposition.02 Destination/Transferred To, Code (for transfer of EMS care)

validation_rules.message: When EMS Agency Number is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When EMS Agency Number has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
EMS Agency Unique State ID and EMS Agency Number should be a unique combination for each EMS agency.

name: sAgency.03
label: EMS Agency Name
definition: The formal name of the EMS agency.
element_comments: An EMS agency can have more than one Agency Number within a state. This reflects the ability for an EMS agency to have a different number for each service type or location (based on state implementation). Used to populate the following data elements: dAgency.03 EMS Agency Name eScene.02 - Other EMS or Public Safety Agencies at Scene eDisposition.01 - Destination/Transferred To, Name (for transfer of EMS care)

validation_rules.message: When EMS Agency Name is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).

When EMS Agency Name has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty. sFacility OSNsFacility.15 - Facility Phone Number0 : M OSNsFacility.14 - Facility US National Grid Coordinates0 : 1 OSNsFacility.13 - Facility GPS Location0 : 1 OSNsFacility.12 - Facility Country0 : 1 N, LESNsFacility.11 - Facility County0 : 1 N, LESNsFacility.10 - Facility ZIP Code0 : 1 N, LESNsFacility.09 - Facility State0 : 1 OSNsFacility.08 - Facility City0 : 1 OSNsFacility.07 - Facility Street Address0 : 1 OSNsFacility.06 - Facility Room, Suite, or Apartment0 : 1 OSNsFacility.05 - Facility National Provider Identifier0 : M N, LESNsFacility.04 - Hospital Designations0 : M N, LESNsFacility.03 - Facility Location Code0 : 1 N, LESNsFacility.02 - Facility Name0 : 1 sFacility.FacilityGroup0 : M N, LESNsFacility.01 - Type of Facility0 : 1 sFacilityGroup0 : M sFacility sFacility

name: sConfiguration.01
label: State Certification/Licensure Levels
definition: The levels of certification/licensure for EMS personnel recognized by the state.
element_comments: Used to populate EMS-related values in the following data elements (some data elements contain additional non-EMS-related values, such as "Student" or "Patient" that should be allowed unless specifically instructed otherwise by the state): dAgency.11 Level of Service dConfiguration.06 EMS Certification Levels Permitted to Perform Each Procedure dConfiguration.08 EMS Certification Levels Permitted to Administer Each Medication dVehicle.05 Crew State Certification/Licensure Levels dPersonnel.24 EMS Personnel's State EMS Certification Licensure Level dPersonnel.38 EMS Personnel's Practice Level ePayment.42 Specialty Care Transport Care Provider

validation_rules.message: When State Certification/Licensure Levels is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When State Certification/Licensure Levels has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
When State Certification/Licensure Levels has a Not Value, no other value should be recorded.
State Certification/Licensure Levels should be unique (the same level should not be listed more than once).
EMS Certification Levels Permitted to Perform Each Procedure should be on the list of State Certification/Licensure Levels.
EMS Certification Levels Permitted to Administer Each Medication should be on the list of State Certification/Licensure Levels.

name: sConfiguration.02
label: EMS Certification Levels Permitted to Perform Each Procedure
official_name: EMS Certification Levels Permitted to Perform Each Procedure
definition: The certification/licensure level that is permitted to perform the procedures listed in sConfiguration.03.
element_comments: Used to populate dConfiguration.06 EMS Certification Levls Permitted to Perform Each Procedure.

validation_rules.message: When EMS Certification Levels Permitted to Perform Each Procedure is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When EMS Certification Levels Permitted to Perform Each Procedure has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
EMS Certification Levels Permitted to Perform Each Procedure should be on the list of State Certification/Licensure Levels.
EMS Certification Levels Permitted to Perform Each Procedure should be unique (the same level should not be listed more than once).

name: sConfiguration.03
label: Procedures Permitted by the State
definition: Procedures permitted by the state for the certification/licensure level listed in sConfiguration.02.
element_comments: Used to populate dConfiguration.07 EMS Agency Procedures.

validation_rules.message: When Procedures Permitted by the State is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Procedures Permitted by the State has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
When Procedures Permitted by the State has a Not Value, no other value should be recorded.
Procedures Permitted by the State should be unique (the same procedure should not be listed more than once for a particular level).

name: sConfiguration.04
label: EMS Certification Levels Permitted to Administer Each Medication
official_name: EMS Certification Levels Permitted to Administer Each Medication
definition: The certification/licensure level that is permitted to administer the medications listed in sConfiguration.05.
element_comments: Used to populate dConfiguration.08 EMS Certification Levels Permitted to Administer Each Medication.

validation_rules.message: When EMS Certification Levels Permitted to Administer Each Medication is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When EMS Certification Levels Permitted to Administer Each Medication has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
EMS Certification Levels Permitted to Administer Each Medication should be on the list of State Certification/Licensure Levels.
EMS Certification Levels Permitted to Administer Each Medication should be unique (the same level should not be listed more than once).

name: sConfiguration.05
label: Medications Permitted by the State
definition: Medications permitted by the state for the certification/licensure level listed in sConfiguration.04.
element_comments: Used to populate dConfiguration.09 EMS Agency Medications List of medications based on RxNorm (RXCUI) code and SNOMED-CT codes for blood products.. List of medications based on RxNorm (RXCUI) code. Reference the NEMSIS Suggested Lists at:  https://nemsis.org/technical-resources/version-3/version-3-resources/ RxNorm Website -  http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm/docs/rxnormfiles.html Product - RxNorm Full Monthly Release SNOMED-CT Website:  http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/Snomed/snomed_main.html Product: Product - UMLS Metathesaurus. Allowable SNOMED-CT codes are: 116762002 Administration of blood product 116795008 Transfusion of cryoprecipitate 116861002 Transfusion of fresh frozen plasma 116865006 Administration of albumin 180208003 Intravenous blood transfusion of platelets 33389009 Transfusion of whole blood 71493000 Transfusion of packed red blood cells

validation_rules.message: When Medications Permitted by the State is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Medications Permitted by the State has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
When Medications Permitted by the State has a Not Value, no other value should be recorded.
Medications Permitted by the State should be unique (the same medication should not be listed more than once for a particular level).
Medications Permitted by the State should be a code of between 2 and 7 digits when Code Type is "RxNorm".
Medications Permitted by the State should be a SNOMED code specifically allowed in the data dictionary when Code Type is "SNOMED".
Medications Permitted by the State should be an RxNorm code of between 2 and 7 digits or a SNOMED code specifically allowed in the data dictionary.

name: sConfiguration.06
label: Protocols Permitted by the State
definition: Protocols permitted by the state.

allowed_values.display: Cardiac Arrest-Ventricular Fibrillation/ Pulseless Ventricular Tachycardia
General-Universal Patient Care/ Initial Patient Contact
General-Law Enforcement - Blood for Legal Purposes
General-Law Enforcement - Assist with Law Enforcement Activity
Cardiac Arrest-Determination of Death / Withholding Resuscitative Efforts

element_comments: Used to populate dConfiguration.10 EMS Agency Protocols.

validation_rules.message: When Protocols Permitted by the State is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Protocols Permitted by the State has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
When Protocols Permitted by the State has a Not Value, no other value should be recorded.

Protocols Permitted by the State should be unique (the same protocol should not be listed more than once). sAgency N, LESNsAgency.03 - EMS Agency Name0 : 1 N, LESNsAgency.02 - EMS Agency Number0 : 1 N, LESNsAgency.01 - EMS Agency Unique State ID0 : 1 sAgencyGroup0 : M sAgency sAgency

version3_changes: Added to better identify states with statewide protocols and define state EMS capability and care.

name: sElement.01
label: State Collected Element
definition: The data elements that the state collects or requires.
element_comments: Used to configure the agency demographic and patient care report data elements that are to be collected and reported to the state by EMS agencies within the state.

validation_rules.message: When State Collected Element is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When State Collected Element has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
When State Collected Element has a Not Value, no other value should be recorded.

State Collected Element should be unique (the same element should not be listed more than once). sConfiguration N, LRSNsConfiguration.06 - Protocols Permitted by the State1 : M N, LRSNsConfiguration.05 - Medications Permitted by the State1 : M N, LRSNsConfiguration.04 - EMS Certification Levels Permitted to Administer Each Medication1 : 1 sConfiguration.MedicationGroup1 : M N, LRSNsConfiguration.03 - Procedures Permitted by the State1 : M N, LRSNsConfiguration.02 - EMS Certification Levels Permitted to Perform Each Procedure1 : 1 sConfiguration.ProcedureGroup1 : M N, LRSNsConfiguration.01 - State Certification/Licensure Levels1 : M sConfiguration sConfiguration

name: sFacility.01
label: Type of Facility
definition: The type of facility (healthcare or other) that the EMS agency transports patients to or from.
element_comments: Used to populate dFacility.01 Type of Facility.

validation_rules.message: When Type of Facility is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Type of Facility has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
Type of Facility, Facility Location Code, Facility Street Address, Facility City, and Facility State should be a unique combination for each facility.

name: sFacility.02
label: Facility Name
definition: The name of the facility.
element_comments: Used to populate dFacility.02 Facility Name

validation_rules.message: When Facility Name is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Facility Name has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.

name: sFacility.03
label: Facility Location Code
definition: The code of the facility as assigned by the state.
element_comments: Used to populate dFacility.03 Facility Location Code.

validation_rules.message: When Facility Location Code is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Facility Location Code has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
Type of Facility, Facility Location Code, Facility Street Address, Facility City, and Facility State should be a unique combination for each facility.

name: sFacility.04
label: Hospital Designations
definition: The designation(s) associated with the hospital (e.g. Trauma, STEMI, Peds, etc).
element_comments: Used to populate dFacility.04 Hospital Designations.

validation_rules.message: When Hospital Designations is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Hospital Designations has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
When Hospital Designations has a Not Value, no other value should be recorded.
Hospital Designations should be unique (the same designation should not be listed more than once).

name: sFacility.05
label: Facility National Provider Identifier
definition: The facility National Provider Identifier(s) associated with National Provider System (NPS).
element_comments: Used to populate dFacility.05 Facility National Provider Identifier.

validation_rules.message: Facility National Provider Identifier should be unique (the same identifier should not be listed more than once).

name: sFacility.06
label: Facility Room, Suite, or Apartment
definition: The number of the specific room, suite, or apartment of the facility.
element_comments: Used to populate dFacility.06 Facility Room, Suite, or Apartment.

name: sFacility.07
label: Facility Street Address
definition: The street address where the facility is located.
element_comments: Used to populate dFacility.07 Facility Street Address.

validation_rules.message: Type of Facility, Facility Location Code, Facility Street Address, Facility City, and Facility State should be a unique combination for each facility.

name: sFacility.08
label: Facility City
definition: The city where the facility is located (physical address).
element_comments: City codes are based on GNIS Feature Class. The primary Feature Class to use is "Civil" with "Populated Place" and "Military" code as additional options. Definitions for each GNIS City Feature Class can be found on the GNIS Codes website. GNIS Codes Website:  http://geonames.usgs.gov/domestic/download_data.htm Used to populate dFacility.08 Facility City.

validation_rules.message: Type of Facility, Facility Location Code, Facility Street Address, Facility City, and Facility State should be a unique combination for each facility.

name: sFacility.09
label: Facility State
definition: The state where the facility is located.
element_comments: GNIS Codes Website:  http://geonames.usgs.gov/domestic/download_data.htm Used to populate dFacility.09 Facility State.

validation_rules.message: When Facility State is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Facility State has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
Type of Facility, Facility Location Code, Facility Street Address, Facility City, and Facility State should be a unique combination for each facility.
Facility County should belong within the Facility State.

name: sFacility.10
label: Facility ZIP Code
definition: The zip code where the facility is located.
element_comments: ZIP Codes Product Website:  Product:https://www.zipcodedownload.com/Products/Product/Z5Commercial/Standard/Overview/ USA - 5-digit ZIP Code Database, Commercial Edition Used to populate dFacility.10 Facility ZIP Code.

validation_rules.message: When Facility ZIP Code is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Facility ZIP Code has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.

name: sFacility.11
label: Facility County
definition: The county where the facility is located.
element_comments: GNIS Codes Website:  http://geonames.usgs.gov/domestic/download_data.htm Used to populate dFacility.11 Facility County.

validation_rules.message: When Facility County is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Facility County has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.
Facility County should belong within the Facility State.

name: sFacility.12
label: Facility Country
definition: The country where the facility is located.
element_comments: ANSI Country Codes (ISO 3166) Website:  https://www.iso.org/iso-3166-country-codes.html Used to populate dFacility.12 Facility Country.

name: sFacility.13
label: Facility GPS Location
definition: The facility GPS Coordinates.
element_comments: The pattern for GPS location is in the format " , " where: latitude longitude -  has a minimum of -90 and a maximum of 90 with up to 6 decimal places latitude -  has a minimum of -180 and a maximum of 180 with up to 6 decimal places longitude Used to populated dFacility.13 Facility GPS Location.

name: sFacility.14
label: Facility US National Grid Coordinates
definition: The facility US National Grid Coordinates.
element_comments: Standard found at . http://www.fgdc.gov/usng Used to populate dFacility.14 Facility US National Grid Coordinates.

name: sFacility.15
label: Facility Phone Number
definition: The facility phone number(s).
element_comments: This element contains an attribute to define what type of phone number is being documented (e.g., Fax, Home, Mobile, Pager, and Work). Used to populate dFacility.15 Facility Phone Number. name: sSoftware.01
label: Software Creator
definition: The name of the vendor, manufacturer, and developer who designed the application that created this state data set record.

validation_rules.message: When Software Creator is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Software Creator has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.

name: sSoftware.02
label: Software Name
definition: The name of the application used to create this state data set record.

validation_rules.message: When Software Name is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
When Software Name has a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting), it should be empty.

name: sSoftware.03

validation_rules.message: When Software Version is empty, it should have a Not Value (Not Applicable, Not Recorded, or Not Reporting, if allowed for the element), or it should be omitted (if the element is optional).
